After you play around with them a bit, you'll start to understand the team synergy + which ones you like and want to invest in.

This still gives you a really strong base to start.
Like you can put Nautila on the Sanga team if you want that. The core of the team is Sanga + Alva.

cool, I read earlier that Lotan really need a pure Chaos team too lol. So that gives me 4 Chaos 4units to try that one
actually would Kath team have enough heals without Doll? or just hope to kill first lol

The way that team works:

1. Play a clem card first each turn (quasar) add strength to team.
2. Over turns get lots of Kathi cards in hand.
3. On a burst turn exalt tinct and drop the arthimetica cost of those Kathi cards by one.
4. Play kathi cards and get hyper X card.
Clem heals.
Once you rouse clem and play her 2 cost, she can heal for 200 - 400 health.
she's one of the strongest healers in the game.

What do Goliath and Clem offer to the team to make it so good?

Short answer dmg
Long answer: Goliath gives a massive burst of temp str during your damage term. Easily giving 100s of str. Clem gives str every turn, access to ultra mechanics which are just generally strong, and her exalt serves as a second stack of vulnerability on an enemy.
All combined you can easily hit a couple million dmg with high enough investment
